prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Kent 1600E (engine code: 227E) with forged internals including Mahle 87.5mm forged pistons, Cunningham con-rods, and a steel crankshaft for a 10.5:1 compression ratio, paired with a Weber 45 DCOE carburetor and a custom 4-2-1 exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering

Full suspension overhaul using Gaz Gold adjustable coilovers with polybushes, reinforced front strut braces by Superflex, and a rear Panhard rod for improved axle location, complemented by Mintex 1155 brake pads and braided brake lines

Lightweight flywheel by Fidanza (10.5 lbs) and a competition-spec clutch by Sachs Performance, combined with a close-ratio Ford Type 9 gearbox with a Quaife ATB differential and a short-shift kit by Tran-X
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using steel flares by JE Motorsport, riveted and seam-welded for rigidity, paired with a period-correct Lotus Cortina-style front splitter and rear ducktail spoiler by Historic Racing Developments

Bespoke livery in Ford Motorsport Diamond White with contrasting Lotus Green stripes, applied using 3M vinyl by Vintage Motorsport Graphics, including authentic Ford Motorsport badges and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (MIG-welded, bolt-in)

OEM+ interior with Recaro SRD bucket seats trimmed in black Alcantara with green stitching by Trim UK, a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a quick-release hub, and a Smiths Chronometric tachometer with a custom gauge pod by Speedhut
